title: Simple Player Statue
description: Adds player statues to the game!
body:
# Simple Player Statues
Hello everybody! This datapacks, as its name implies, adds player statues! They don't do much, but they can look quite nice as decoration! I hope you enjoy this simple datapack!

## Crafting recipe
This image here is the crafting recipe for the player statue. Do note that any dye can be used in the recipe!

![The crafting recipe for the Player Statue](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d6da7c0166ef6a6587528c03e224be4081decef.png)

## How to remove
To break these statues, you need to break the stone slab underneath them.
